title: A Cute Baby Dinosaur Found in Korea
summary: Scientists in South Korea found a new baby dinosaur hidden inside a rock. They named it Doolysaurus after a famous cartoon dinosaur called Dooly, which is loved by many people in Korea. This is the first new dinosaur species discovered in Korea in 15 years. The dinosaur was about two years old when it died and was as big as a turkey. It might have had soft, fuzzy skin like a little lamb. Scientists used a special machine called a micro-CT scan to see the bones inside the rock without breaking it. This helped them find more parts, like pieces of the skull. The discovery is exciting because it helps us learn more about dinosaurs that lived long ago.

background_read: Dinosaurs are ancient animals that lived millions of years ago. Scientists find their bones, called fossils, in rocks to learn about them. In South Korea, people love a cartoon dinosaur named Dooly, which inspired the name for a new baby dinosaur found there. This discovery helps us understand what dinosaurs looked like and how they lived.
Article_Structure: WHO: Scientists in South Korea led by Jongyun Jung and Julia Clarke
WHAT: Found a new baby dinosaur species named Doolysaurus
WHERE: On Aphae Island in South Korea
WHY: To learn more about dinosaurs and honor a cartoon character

perspectives.description: Finding new dinosaur species helps us understand ancient life.
